text.title: MLP Planning Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals to apply / skip / route-elsewhere. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: pre-MVP or already high retention; different methodology

branch.question: Functional + Reliable layers >= 3 (no known broken core flows)?

conclusion.verdict: block delight; fix base via bug/perf methodologies
run full MLP audit with retention curve target

text.example: applies=true -> base_ok=true -> run full audit (rule four-layer-audit).
